extensionDescription.message: Te whakatikatika momotuhi Arapi ngaio mo ia paetukutuku. Ka whakatika i te mokowā o ngā reta, ka whakauru i ngā momotuhi Arapi ataahua, ka whakatika i ngā take tuku e pakaru ana te kuputuhi Arapi.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Whakahohe, whakamomori ranei i te toronga Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Ka whakatakotohia te mokowā reta ki te 0 i ngā wā katoa hei ārai i te wehenga o ngā reta Arapi. Koinei te take tino nui o te whakaaturanga Arapi pakaru i te ipurangi.

forceRTLDescription.message: Ka akiakihia te aronga katau-ki-mauī ki ngā poraka kuputuhi Arapi. Whakahohe mō ngā paetukutuku e hē ana te whakaaturanga o te reo Arapi i te mauī-ki-katau.

diacriticsLabel.message: Whakatika i te Mokowā Tohu Reo

diacriticsDescription.message: Ka whakapai ake i te tuku o ngā tohu oropuare Arapi (tashkeel) hei ārai i te tapahi i runga ake, i raro hoki o te rārangi kuputuhi.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Whakamahia he momotuhi rerekē i tēnei paetukutuku

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Kōwhiria he momotuhi rerekē mō tēnei paetukutuku anake, ka whakakore i tō kōwhiringa momotuhi ā-ao.

fontSourceNote.message: Ka tukuna ngā momotuhi e Google Fonts. Me hononga ipurangi mō te uta tuatahi.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Ka tukuna ngā tono momotuhi ki ngā tūmau a Google. Tirohia fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusArabicDetected.message: Kua kitea he kuputuhi Arapi — $COUNT$ ngā huānga kua whakatikahia.

statusGlobalMode.message: Kei te whakamahi i te aronga ā-ao — kua kitea ngā huanga lang/dir.

statusNoArabic.message: Kāore he kuputuhi Arapi i kitea i tēnei whārangi.

statusContentScriptUnavailable.message: Kāore e taea te uru atu ki tēnei whārangi.

siteBannerText.message: Kua whakamomoria te Arabic Type i $HOSTNAME$.

removeExceptionAriaLabel.message: Tango i a $HOSTNAME$ mai i ngā paetukutuku kua whakamomoria
